description: A paginated list of contact records.
name: CollectionResponseContact

id.description: The unique identifier for the contact.

properties.description: The contact's properties as key-value pairs.

createdAt.description: The date and time the contact was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the contact was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the contact has been archived.

associations.description: The contact's associations with other CRM objects.

after.description: The cursor to use to get the next page of results.
